item:
Concept: “promise (the words)”
Statement: Every promise is a place — somewhere one can be; normally a place far away.

Concept: “promise (the words)”
Statement: In every case of “promise (the words)”, there is a place that makes it happen on purpose — normally a place far away.

Concept: “begin (happening X begins at time T)”
Statement: In every case of “begin (happening X begins at time T)” as described above, T is a place — somewhere one can be; normally a place far away.

Concept: “has part (X has part Y)”
Statement: In every case of “has part (X has part Y)” as described above, Y is a time — a moment or stretch of time; normally a time long past.

Statement: In every case of “repair (X repairs Y)” as described above, X is a time — a moment or stretch of time; normally a time long past.
